landing.title: Mem – Your AI Thought Partner
landing.text:
Mem – Your AI Thought Partner
Product
keyboard_arrow_down
Solutions
keyboard_arrow_down
Pricing
Log in
Download
One place for everything on your mind
Dump your ideas, meetings, and research into Mem—and get it all organized for you.
Download Mem
Watch the video
Remembering is so yesterday
We pour so much into not forgetting. You could keep using chaotic systems—or—you could let Mem learn how you think and do the remembering for you.
Get things out of your head and into Mem
Dump anything into Mem and rest assured you’ll find it easily later.
With your voice
Turn brain dumps into beautifully organized notes.
In meetings
Let Mem record, transcribe, and take meeting notes for you.
On the web
Save any website in a single click with the Mem Chrome Extension.
On the go
Shoot Mem a quick message with the info you want to remember.
Mem helps you use everything you save
Mem remembers and organizes for you, bringing up past notes and info so nothing goes to waste.
No-effort organizing
Quickly throw notes into collections, or just ask Mem to organize them for you.
See related context without asking
Didn’t organize? No problem. Heads Up automatically brings up related timelines, notes, collections
Mem understands and answers questions about your notes
Mem knows what’s related, quickly connecting relevant details and topics.
Find needle-in-a-haystack info
Find that thing on the tip of your tongue, even without keywords. If you can describe it, you can find it.
Chat with your mind’s better half
Trust Mem to help you use your notes to the fullest while answering questions or drafting content.
Do more with Mem
Get handy tips and tricks on the
The Memo
Blog
Product Update Roundup: Calendar Integration, Claude Connector, Referral Program, + Beta Features for Pro Users
Use Case
Your favorite LLMs can now use your second brain as context
Use Case
Mem has your back, when meetings are back-to-back
A match for great minds
Download Mem
I no longer worry about how I organize or segment notes into different apps—I toss it in Mem and know it will be there when I need it. So much weight off my shoulders.
Zach Price
Founder at Impulse to Impact

analysis.name: Mem
analysis.tagline: One place for everything on your mind
analysis.value_proposition: AI-powered personal knowledge base that automatically organizes notes, transcribes meetings, and surfaces relevant context so users never have to manually file or retrieve information.
analysis.ideal_customer: Knowledge workers, founders, and individuals who want a frictionless capture-and-recall system without manual organization overhead

features.name: voice note capture
features.description: Dictate brain dumps that get converted into organized notes
features.evidence_quote: Turn brain dumps into beautifully organized notes.

features.name: meeting recording
features.description: Automatically records audio from meetings
features.evidence_quote: Let Mem record, transcribe, and take meeting notes for you.

features.name: meeting transcription
features.description: Transcribes recorded meeting audio to text
features.evidence_quote: Let Mem record, transcribe, and take meeting notes for you.

features.name: ai meeting notes
features.description: Automatically generates structured notes from recorded meetings
features.evidence_quote: Let Mem record, transcribe, and take meeting notes for you.

features.name: chrome extension web clipper
features.description: One-click save of any website to Mem
features.evidence_quote: Save any website in a single click with the Mem Chrome Extension.

features.name: mobile quick capture
features.description: Send a quick message to Mem on mobile to capture information
features.evidence_quote: Shoot Mem a quick message with the info you want to remember.

features.name: collections
features.description: Group notes into named collections for lightweight organization
features.evidence_quote: Quickly throw notes into collections, or just ask Mem to organize them for you.

features.name: ai auto-organization
features.description: Ask Mem to automatically organize notes into collections on your behalf
features.evidence_quote: just ask Mem to organize them for you.

features.name: heads up related context
features.description: Proactively surfaces related timelines, notes, and collections without user prompting
features.evidence_quote: Heads Up automatically brings up related timelines, notes, collections

features.name: natural language search
features.description: Find notes by describing them rather than using exact keywords
features.evidence_quote: Find that thing on the tip of your tongue, even without keywords. If you can describe it, you can find it.

features.name: ai chat over notes
features.description: Chat interface to ask questions about your saved notes and get answers
features.evidence_quote: Trust Mem to help you use your notes to the fullest while answering questions or drafting content.

features.name: ai content drafting
features.description: Generate new content using saved notes as context
features.evidence_quote: Trust Mem to help you use your notes to the fullest while answering questions or drafting content.

features.name: calendar integration
features.description: Connects calendar events to note-taking and meeting workflows
features.evidence_quote: Product Update Roundup: Calendar Integration, Claude Connector, Referral Program, + Beta Features

features.name: claude connector
features.description: Integration with Anthropic's Claude LLM as an AI backend or connector
features.evidence_quote: Product Update Roundup: Calendar Integration, Claude Connector, Referral Program, + Beta Features

features.name: llm context api / mcp support
features.description: Expose personal knowledge base as context for external LLMs and AI tools
features.evidence_quote: Your favorite LLMs can now use your second brain as context

features.name: daily retrospective automation
features.description: Automates creation of a daily done list / retrospective from captured notes
features.evidence_quote: The Art of the "Done" List: Automating Your Daily Retrospective

features.name: ai knowledge base refactoring
features.description: AI-powered bulk cleanup and restructuring of an existing note library
features.evidence_quote: The End of "Note Rot": How to Use AI to Refactor Your Entire Knowledge Base in Minutes

features.name: soc 2 type ii compliance
features.description: Third-party audited security certification for enterprise trust
features.evidence_quote: Mem is Now SOC 2 Type II Compliant

features.name: google sso
features.description: Sign in / authenticate with a Google account
features.evidence_quote: Log in with Google

features.name: apple sso
features.description: Sign in / authenticate with an Apple ID
features.evidence_quote: Sign in with Apple

features.name: desktop app
features.description: Native downloadable desktop application
features.evidence_quote: Download Mem

features.name: related timelines
features.description: Automatic chronological view of related notes surfaced by Heads Up feature
features.evidence_quote: Heads Up automatically brings up related timelines, notes, collections

features.name: referral program
features.description: User referral incentive program
features.evidence_quote: Product Update Roundup: Calendar Integration, Claude Connector, Referral Program, + Beta Features

features.name: pro beta features
features.description: Early access beta features available to Pro tier subscribers
features.evidence_quote: Beta Features for Pro Users

differentiators: Positions as 'world's first AI thought partner' — not just note-taking but active recall and organization
Heads Up: proactively surfaces related context without user querying
Zero-effort organizing — AI handles taxonomy so user never files anything manually
Natural language / semantic search without keyword matching
LLM context bridge — exposes personal notes as context layer for external AI tools
